title: You Deleted Everything and AWS Is Still Charging You
summary: AWS Developers presents a troubleshooting guide for unexpected AWS charges after resource deletion. The video covers hidden costs from RDS snapshots, EBS volumes, elastic IPs, and NAT gateways, then demonstrates how to set up billing alarms to prevent surprise charges. The guide emphasizes checking billing reports and establishing monitoring as part of cloud resource cleanup workflows.
